objective: Plan selected connected and secured public service families over a devnet or compatible settlement environment with explicit posture, assurance, disputes, suspension, and exit.
falsifiable_claim: Selected service families can complete positive, failure, dispute, renewal, suspension, and exit paths while every posture and assurance claim remains service-specific.
exit_criteria: Selected public service families pass positive, failure, dispute, renewal, suspension, and exit on devnet or compatible settlement.
Posture, assurance, rights, reputation, and shared-security claims remain scoped to the selected service family.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M14_NETWORK_SERVICE_DEVNET_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Fail enrollment, service invocation, receipt, settlement, registry, rights, reputation, escrow, bond, dispute, adjudication, renewal, suspension, exit, and shared-security boundaries.
remaining_nonclaims: No mainnet, native asset, generic safety, generic correctness, or stage closure claim.
Connected service availability does not establish demand or authorize L1.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
